title: Missing Update Icon on Deals Page
excerpt: Since the recent update, the update icon is no longer visible on the Deals overview page, significantly disrupting our sales process and team coordination. Previously, the icon provided a clear and efficient way to see i…

posts.author: MarcoSilvester (Marco Van Tilburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since the recent update, the update icon is no longer visible on the Deals overview page, significantly disrupting our sales process and team coordination. Previously, the icon provided a clear and efficient way to see if an update had been added by the sales team, directly from the overview.

Now, with this change, we are forced to open each deal individually to check for updates—a major inefficiency when managing around 1,000 active deals. This drastically increases the time required to track progress and communicate effectively.

Proposed Solution:

  • Make this new change optional so users can choose their preferred workflow.
  • Restore the update icon to its previous functionality for better visibility and efficiency.

This update has added unnecessary complexity. Please reconsider bringing back the icon or providing an alternative solution to maintain workflow efficiency.
